title: MicroSim Folder index.md Template
description: <iframe src="./main.html" height="600px" width="600px" scrolling="no" style="overflow: hidden"></iframe>
subject: Mathematics
author: Dan McCreary
learningObjectives: Identify the six levels of Bloom's revised taxonomy - Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, and Create - in their pyramid ordering
Explain what cognitive process each level names, from retrieving facts from memory up to composing new structures
Distinguish Understand from Apply, and Analyze from Evaluate, using the hover descriptions for each band
Classify a given learning objective into the taxonomy level its verb targets
